rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §29.187, which governs career and technology education achievement awards. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 29.187. AWARD FOR DISTINGUISHED ACHIEVEMENT IN CAREER AND TECHNOLOGY EDUCATION; PROGRAM.
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
